summary: pytest-xdist worker crashed (not properly terminated) while running test_classification_sample_async_fp16 in Samples smoke tests on Windows (two Samples jobs, two separate worker crashes in params 4 and 5).
root_cause: Flaky test: async classification sample worker process crashes during fp16 inference test on Windows CI runner. This is a recurring pattern seen for multiple PRs. Unrelated to the GPU eltwise quantization change in PR #33769.
